content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Lemon.io: Senior UI&UX / Graphic Designer Anywhere in the World 🇦🇩 Andorra, 🇦🇱 Albania, 🇦🇷 Argentina, 🇦🇹 Austria, 🇦🇺 Australia, 🇧🇦 Bosnia and Herzegovina, 🇧🇪 Belgium, 🇧🇷 Brazil, 🇧🇿 Belize, 🇨🇦 Canada, 🇨🇭 Switzerland, 🇨🇱 Chile, 🇨🇴 Colombia, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, 🇨🇾 Cyprus, 🇨🇿 Czechia, 🇩🇪 Germany, 🇩🇰 Denmark, 🇩🇴 Dominican Republic, 🇪🇨 Ecuador, 🇪🇪 Estonia, 🇪🇸 Spain, 🇫🇮 Finland, 🇫🇷 France, 🇬🇧 United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, 🇬🇷 Greece, 🇬🇹 Guatemala, 🇭🇳 Honduras, 🇭🇷 Croatia, 🇭🇹 Haiti, 🇮🇩 Indonesia, 🇮🇪 Ireland, 🇮🇱 Israel, 🇮🇹 Italy, 🇯🇲 Jamaica, 🇯🇵 Japan, 🇰🇷 Korea (Republic of), 🇱🇹 Lithuania, 🇱🇺 Luxembourg, 🇱🇻 Latvia, 🇲🇦 Morocco, 🇲🇩 Moldova (Republic of), 🇲🇪 Montenegro, 🇲🇰 North Macedonia, 🇲🇹 Malta, 🇲🇽 Mexico, 🇲🇾 Malaysia, 🇳🇱 Netherlands, 🇳🇴 Norway, 🇳🇿 New Zealand, 🇵🇦 Panama, 🇵🇪 Peru, 🇵🇬 Papua New Guinea, 🇵🇭 Philippines, 🇵🇱 Poland, 🇵🇷 Puerto Rico, 🇵🇹 Portugal, 🇵🇾 Paraguay, 🇷🇴 Romania, 🇸🇪 Sweden, 🇸🇬 Singapore, 🇸🇮 Slovenia, 🇸🇰 Slovakia, 🇸🇻 El Salvador, 🇹🇭 Thailand, 🇺🇦 Ukraine, 🇺🇸 United States of America, 🇺🇾 Uruguay, 🇻🇳 Viet Nam, and 🇿🇦 South Africa Delaware Adobe Creative Suite, Adobe Illustrator, Figma, Graphic Design, UI/UX, UI/UX Design, UX design, Senior, Design, Full Time, Product Designer, and Prototyping All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0076/3337/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York, NY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://lemon.io">https://lemon.io</a> </p> <p>Are you a talented Senior Designer looking for a remote job that lets you show your skills and get decent compensation? Look no further than <a href="https://lemon.io/for-developers/?utm_source=weworkremotely&amp;utm_medium=job_ad&amp;utm_campaign=supply_en_ui/ux/graphic_designer_jun_2026_job_ad">Lemon.io</a> — the marketplace that connects you with hand-picked startups in the US and Europe.</p> <p><strong>What we offer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>The rate depends on your seniority level, skills and experience. We've already paid out over $11M to our engineers &amp; designers.</li> <li>No more hunting for clients or negotiating rates — let us handle the business side of things so you can focus on what you do best.</li> <li>We'll manually find the best project for you according to your skills and preferences.</li> <li>Choose a schedule that works best for you. It’s possible to communicate async or minimally overlap within team working hours.</li> <li>We respect your seniority so you can expect no micromanagement or screen trackers.</li> <li>Communicate directly with the clients. Most of them have technical backgrounds. Sounds good, yeah?</li> <li>We will support you from the time you submit the application throughout all cooperation stages.</li> <li>Most of our projects involve working in a fast-paced startup environment. We hope you like it as much as we do.</li> <li>Through our community, we will connect you with the best developers &amp; designers from more than 75 countries.</li> </ul> <p>We have different positions for Designers — please check the details below.</p> <p><strong>Requirements for the Senior UI &amp; UX Designer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in UI &amp; UX Design</li> <li>3+ years of commercial experience with Figma &amp; 5+ years with Prototyping, <strong>OR</strong> 5+ years of commercial experience with Figma &amp; 3+ years with Prototyping</li> <li>Experience with Product Design &amp; Adobe is required</li> </ul> <p><strong>Requirements for the Senior Graphic Designer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in Graphic Design</li> <li>5+ years of commercial experience with Adobe Creative Suite &amp; Adobe Illustrator</li> </ul> <p><strong>Other requirements:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Strong design craft</strong> — as a Senior Designer, you're expected to build polished, production-ready work from scratch, with a solid grasp of design systems, component architecture, and how your decisions translate into real product or brand outcomes.</li> <li><strong>Clear and confident communication in English</strong> — advanced ability to discuss creative briefs, defend design decisions, and flag blockers early. Strong self-presentation is essential, particularly on client calls.</li> <li><strong>High ownership, zero hand-holding</strong> — you thrive working full-time remotely, manage your own time, and consistently hit deadlines without being chased.</li> <li><strong>Reliability</strong> — we need to trust you completely. If you commit to something, you deliver it. If something changes, you communicate early.</li> <li><strong>Fast ramp-up</strong> — you can absorb project context quickly, align with existing style guides or brand directions, and start producing valuable work within the first days, not weeks.</li> </ul> <p><strong>NOT YOUR TECH STACK?</strong></p> <p>We have a variety of projects, so if you have 4+ years of commercial software development experience and are proficient in AI Agent Architecture, AI Automation Architecture, AI Engineering, Site Reliability Engineering, Platform Engineering, React &amp; Python, React &amp; Golang, React &amp; Java, React &amp; Ruby, PHP &amp; Vue, Vue &amp; Node.js, React &amp; .NET, Android &amp; iOS, Blockchain (Ethereum/Ethers.js/Wagmi/Viem/Solana), Angular &amp; Node.js, Vue &amp; .NET, Python &amp; Vue, DevOps with Azure DevOps, MLOps, Data Science, Angular &amp; PHP, Angular &amp; .NET, Symfony &amp; React, Symfony &amp; Vue, Symfony &amp; Angular, Symfony &amp; JavaScript &amp; Next.js &amp; TypeScript, Data Analysis, React &amp; PHP, Data Engineering, Project Management, React Native &amp; Node, Data Annotation, React &amp; Node.js, Svelte &amp; Python, Svelte &amp; Node.js, Svelte &amp; TypeScript, Rust, Shopify &amp; JavaScript, Vue &amp; Nuxt, PHP &amp; Laravel, Animation, React &amp; Node &amp; React Native, .NET &amp; C#, Unreal Engine &amp; C++, Python &amp; LLM, Unity, or Machine Learning Engineering, we would be happy to connect with you and match you with a project that fits your experience.</p> <p>We do not provide visa assistance, and our cooperation model does not include the benefits typically offered with direct hire.</p> <p>We work with developers &amp; designers from 75+ countries across Europe, Latin America, North America (the U.S. and Canada), selected countries in Asia (Japan, Singapore, South Korea, the Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, and Israel), Oceania (Australia, New Zealand, and Papua New Guinea), and Africa (including Morocco and South Africa).</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-ui-ux-graphic-designer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/lemon-io-senior-ui-ux-graphic-designer</a></p> Wed, 10 Jun 2026 12:09:4
